notes: MegaBugs ticket draft retention — your in-progress new ticket is now auto-saved to localStorage so navigating around MegaLoad while writing it no longer loses your work. A NotebookPen icon appears next to the cart in the titlebar whenever you have an unsubmitted draft; click it to jump straight back into the form with everything restored. Also strips the 6 placeholder Ashlands ruin pot pieces (Red and Cracked variants aren't placeable in-game) and lets the build-mats rollup recognise Destructible-source materials like Pot Shards and Charcoal Resin.
